# HEIC Fixtures

`sample.heic` is copied from `strukturag/libheif` upstream examples:

- Source: `https://github.com/strukturag/libheif/blob/master/examples/example.heic`
- License notice copied to `sample-heic-LICENSE.txt` from the same upstream examples directory.

The fixture is public test imagery used for decoder interoperability. It is not a user photo fixture and BURAN tests do not fetch it at runtime.
